title: Farm Labor Contractors
description: Recruit and hire seasonal or temporary agricultural laborers. May transport, house, and provide meals for workers.

tasks.text: Pay wages of contracted farm laborers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide food, drinking water, and field sanitation facilities to contracted workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Employ foremen to deal directly with workers when recruiting, hiring, instructing, assigning tasks, and enforcing work rules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise the work of contracted employees.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct and transport workers to appropriate work sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
